Ntc Of Mtn For Sanctions For Failure To Appear At Independent Medical Exam
Off Calendar Jul-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Deborah Mosser's motion for sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff James Aponte Gayapa shall pay $995 within 30 days of notice of this order as attorneys fees and costs associated with the failure to appear at the independent medical examination. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Sumair S. Sandhu, Esq., for Defendant and moving party: Deborah Mosser
Ronald P. Schneider, Esq., for Plaintiff and opposing party: James Aponte Gayapa

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Deborah Mosser's motion to compel an independent medical examination before Dr. Charles Stuart is denied. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.
